description: Streamline financial tasks with secure account management and transaction processing. Enables user registration, balance tracking, and payment handling.

tools.name: account_get
tools.description: Get account by ID. Required: accountId. Returns the Account.

tools.name: account_cards_get-account
tools.description: Retrieve all debit and credit cards associated with a specific account. Required: accountId. Returns the AccountCardsResponse.

tools.name: account_request-send-money_request_send_money
tools.description: Create a 'request to send money' that will require approval based on your organization's approval policies. Required: accountId, amount, idempotencyKey, paymentMethod, recipientId. Optional: externalMemo, note. Returns the new SendMoneyApprovalRequestResponse.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount of USD you want to send, must be a positive number.

tools.name: account_statements_get-account
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of monthly statements for a specific account. Supports cursor-based pagination with limit, order, start_after, and end_before query parameters, as well as date range filtering with start and end parameters. Required: accountId. Optional: limit (default: 1000), order (default: desc), start_after (plus 3 more). Returns the DepositoryAccountStatementsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: account_transaction_get
tools.description: Get transaction by ID. Required: accountId, transactionId. Returns the Transaction.

tools.name: account_transactions_create
tools.description: Send money from an account to a recipient. Creates a transaction that will be processed immediately or may require approval. Required: accountId, amount, idempotencyKey, paymentMethod, recipientId. Optional: externalMemo, note, purpose. Returns the new Transaction.

params.name: amount
params.description: Amount of USD you want to send, must be a positive number.

params.name: paymentMethod
params.description: If domesticWire is used, then the purpose field is required.

params.name: purpose
params.description: Purpose of payment with category and optional additional info. Required when paymentMethod is 'domesticWire'.

tools.name: account_transactions_list-account
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of transactions for a specific account. Supports filtering by date range, status, and search terms. Required: accountId. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start, end (plus 7 more). Returns the TransactionsResponse.

tools.name: accounts_get
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of accounts. Supports cursor-based pagination with limit, order, start_after, and end_before query parameters. Optional: limit (default: 1000), order (default: asc), start_after (plus 1 more). Returns the AccountsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: ar_cancel-invoice
tools.description: Cancel an invoice. This action cannot be undone. Required: invoiceId.

tools.name: ar_create-customer
tools.description: Create a new customer for the organization. Required: email, name. Optional: address. Returns the new ApiV1ArCustomerResponseData.

params.name: address
params.description: Address input for creating or updating customers

tools.name: ar_create-invoice
tools.description: Create a new invoice for the organization. Required: achDebitEnabled, ccEmails, creditCardEnabled, customerId, destinationAccountId, dueDate, invoiceDate, lineItems, useRealAccountNumber. Optional: internalNote, invoiceNumber, payerMemo (plus 4 more). Returns the new ApiV1ArInvoiceResponse.

params.name: achDebitEnabled
params.description: Whether or not the invoice can be paid via ACH debit.

params.name: ccEmails
params.description: Emails to be CCed on invoice notifications/reminders.

params.name: creditCardEnabled
params.description: Whether or not the invoice can be paid via credit card. Requires Stripe to be setup for the Mercury account.

params.name: customerId
params.description: The customer who will receive the invoice. Use the /api/v1/ar/customers endpoint to list your customers and find the corresponding id, or create a new customer first.

params.name: internalNote
params.description: Internal note for the invoice, visible by users in the organization but not visible to payers.

params.name: lineItems
params.description: The line items for the invoice

params.name: payerMemo
params.description: Memo for the payer of the invoice.

params.name: poNumber
params.description: Purchase order number for the invoice, if applicable.

params.name: useRealAccountNumber
params.description: Whether or not the invoice payment instructions will show the real account and routing number for the destination account or use virtual account numbers instead. Virtual accounts are safer and are preferred in most cases.

tools.name: ar_delete-customer
tools.description: Delete a customer. This action cannot be undone. Required: customerId. Destructive.

tools.name: ar_get-attachment
tools.description: Retrieve attachment details including download URL. Required: attachmentId. Returns the ApiV1ArAttachmentResponseData.

tools.name: ar_get-customer
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific customer by their ID. Required: customerId. Returns the ApiV1ArCustomerResponseData.

tools.name: ar_get-invoice
tools.description: Retrieve details of an invoice by its ID. Required: invoiceId. Returns the ApiV1ArInvoiceResponse.

tools.name: ar_get-invoice-pdf
tools.description: Downloads a PDF file for the specified invoice. The response includes a Content-Disposition header set to 'attachment' with the filename. Required: invoiceId.

tools.name: ar_list-customers
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers. Supports cursor-based pagination with limit, order, start_after, and end_before query parameters. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start_after, end_before (plus 1 more). Returns the ApiV1ArCustomerPaginatedResponseData.

tools.name: ar_list-invoice-attachments
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all attachments for a specific invoice. Required: invoiceId. Returns the ApiV1ArAttachmentsResponseData.

tools.name: ar_list-invoices
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of invoices. Supports cursor-based pagination with limit, order, start_after, and end_before query parameters. Optional: limit (default: 1000), order (default: asc), start_after (plus 1 more). Returns the ApiV1ArInvoicesPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: ar_update-customer
tools.description: Update an existing customer. Required: customerId, email, name, resendOpenInvoices. Optional: address. Returns the new ApiV1ArCustomerResponseData.

params.name: address
params.description: Address input for creating or updating customers

params.name: resendOpenInvoices
params.description: Open invoices for the customer will be resent with updated data when this is true.

tools.name: ar_update-invoice
tools.description: Update an existing invoice. Required: invoiceId, achDebitEnabled, ccEmails, creditCardEnabled, dueDate, invoiceDate, invoiceNumber, lineItems, useRealAccountNumber. Optional: internalNote, payerMemo, poNumber (plus 2 more). Returns the new ApiV1ArInvoiceResponse.

params.name: achDebitEnabled
params.description: Whether or not the invoice can be paid via ACH debit.

params.name: ccEmails
params.description: List of emails to be CCed on notifications/reminders.

params.name: creditCardEnabled
params.description: Whether or not the invoice can be paid via credit card. Requires Stripe to be setup for the Mercury account.

params.name: internalNote
params.description: Internal note for the invoice, visible by users in the organization but not visible to payers.

params.name: lineItems
params.description: The line items for the invoice

params.name: payerMemo
params.description: Memo for the payer of the invoice.

params.name: poNumber
params.description: The purchase order number for the invoice if applicable.

params.name: useRealAccountNumber
params.description: Whether or not the invoice payment instructions will show the real account and routing number for the destination account or use virtual account numbers instead.

tools.name: books_delete-agent-coa-template
tools.description: Delete a specific Chart of Accounts template. Required: coaTemplateId. Returns array of DeleteAgentCoaTemplateItem. Destructive.

tools.name: books_delete-agent-ledger-template
tools.description: Delete an existing ledger within an agent-owned Chart of Accounts template. Required: ledgerId. Returns array of DeleteAgentLedgerTemplateItem. Destructive.

tools.name: books_delete-journal-entries
tools.description: Bulk delete journal entries. Required: booksId, journalEntryIds. Returns array of DeleteJournalEntriesItem. Destructive.

params.name: journalEntryIds
params.description: A list of journal entry ids to delete

tools.name: books_get-agent-coa-template
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific Chart of Accounts template. Required: coaTemplateId. Optional: expand. Returns the GetBooksApiagentCoaTemplateResponse.

tools.name: books_get-agent-coa-templates
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all default and agent-owned Chart of Accounts templates. These templates can be used when creating new Books instances for clients. Optional: pageToken, limit, expand. Returns the GetBooksApiagentCoaTemplatesResponse.

tools.name: books_get-journal-entries
tools.description: List all journal entries. Required: booksId. Optional: startDate, endDate, ledgerId (plus 10 more). Returns the GetBooksApijournalEntriesResponse.

tools.name: books_get-journal-entry
tools.description: Retrieve a Journal Entry. Required: booksId, journalEntryId. Optional: expand. Returns the GetBooksApijournalEntryResponse.

tools.name: books_post-agent-coa-templates
tools.description: Create a new agent-owned Chart of Accounts template. These templates can be used when creating new Books instances for clients. Required: accountingBasis, name. Optional: expand. Returns the new CreateBooksApiagentCoaTemplateResponse.

params.name: name
params.description: An arbitrary string on the object, useful for identifying the Chart of Accounts template.

tools.name: books_post-agent-ledger-templates
tools.description: Create a new ledger within an agent-owned Chart of Accounts template. Required: coaTemplateId, debitCredit, editable, financialAccountType, ledgerSubType, ledgerType, name, reportCashFlow, sortCode. Optional: parentId. Returns the new CreateBooksApiagentLedgerTemplateResponse.

params.name: editable
params.description: Whether line entries can be manually added or removed from the ledger.

params.name: parentId
params.description: If the ledger is a child Ledger, the ID of the parent ledger object.

params.name: reportCashFlow
params.description: Whether Teal includes this ledger in the cash flow report.

params.name: sortCode
params.description: Determines the display order in reports, ordered digit by digit.

tools.name: books_post-journal-entries
tools.description: Create multiple Journal Entries. Required: booksId. Optional: expand, modifiedBy. Returns the new CreateBooksApijournalEntriesBulkResponse.

tools.name: books_put-agent-ledger-template
tools.description: Update an existing ledger within an agent-owned Chart of Accounts template. Required: ledgerId. Optional: name, sortCode. Returns the updated UpdateBooksApiagentLedgerTemplateResponse.

params.name: sortCode
params.description: Determines the display order in reports, ordered digit by digit.

tools.name: books_put-journal-entries
tools.description: Bulk update journal entries. Required: booksId, updates. Returns array of PutJournalEntriesItem.

tools.name: cards_create
tools.description: Issue a new virtual card. Required: accountId, kind, type, userId. Optional: nickname, spendLimit. Returns the new Card.

params.name: accountId
params.description: The deposit account the new card will draw funds from.

params.name: nickname
params.description: Optional user-assigned label for the card.

params.name: spendLimit
params.description: Spending controls applied to a card

params.name: userId
params.description: The user to assign as the cardholder.

tools.name: cards_get
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific card by its ID. Required: cardId. Returns the Card.

tools.name: cards_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of cards. Optional: accountId, status, type (plus 6 more). Returns the CardListResponse.

tools.name: cards_update
tools.description: Update a card's nickname or spending limits. Required: cardId, nickname. Optional: spendLimit. Returns the new Card.

params.name: nickname
params.description: Nickname update action. Omit the field to keep the current nickname, send null or an empty/whitespace-only string to clear it, or send a string to set it.

params.name: spendLimit
params.description: Spending controls applied to a card

tools.name: cards_cancel_card
tools.description: Permanently cancel a card. This action cannot be undone. Required: cardId. Returns the new Card.

tools.name: cards_freeze_card
tools.description: Temporarily freeze a card. The card must be active. Required: cardId. Returns the new Card.

tools.name: cards_unfreeze_card
tools.description: Unfreeze a previously frozen card, restoring it to active status. Required: cardId. Returns the new Card.

tools.name: categories_create-category
tools.description: Create a new custom expense category for the organization. Required: name, visibleForCardSpend, visibleForOther, visibleForReimbursements. Returns the new CategoryData.

params.name: visibleForCardSpend
params.description: Whether this category is applicable to card transactions

params.name: visibleForOther
params.description: Whether this category is applicable to all other transaction kinds

params.name: visibleForReimbursements
params.description: Whether this category is applicable to expense reimbursement transactions

tools.name: categories_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all available custom expense categories for the organization. Supports cursor-based pagination with limit, order, start_after, and end_before query parameters. Optional: limit (default: 1000), order (default: asc), start_after (plus 1 more). Returns the CategoriesPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: categories_edit_category
tools.description: Update an existing custom expense category for the organization. Required: expenseCategoryId. Optional: name, visibleForCardSpend, visibleForOther (plus 1 more). Returns the new CategoryData.

params.name: visibleForCardSpend
params.description: Whether this category is applicable to card transactions

params.name: visibleForOther
params.description: Whether this category is applicable to all other transaction kinds

params.name: visibleForReimbursements
params.description: Whether this category is applicable to expense reimbursement transactions

tools.name: credit_list
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all credit accounts for the organization. Returns the CreditAccountsResponse.

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Get all events. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start_after, end_before (plus 3 more). Returns the ApiEventsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: events_get-eventid
tools.description: Get event by ID. Required: eventId. Returns the ApiEventResponse.

tools.name: organization_get
tools.description: Retrieve information about your organization including EIN, legal business name, and DBAs. Returns the OrganizationResponse.

tools.name: recipient_get
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific recipient by ID. Required: recipientId. Returns the RecipientInfo.

tools.name: recipient_update
tools.description: Edit information about a specific recipient. Required: recipientId. Optional: address, checkInfo, contactEmail (plus 5 more). Returns the new RecipientInfo.

params.name: checkInfo
params.description: Information needed to send a check.

params.name: contactEmail
params.description: Contact email address of the recipient

params.name: domesticWireRoutingInfo
params.description: Information needed to send a domestic wire.

params.name: electronicRoutingInfo
params.description: Information needed to send an ACH.

tools.name: recipient_attachments_upload-recipient
tools.description: Upload a tax form attachment for a recipient. The file is uploaded via multipart/form-data. Supported file types include PDF, images (PNG, JPG, GIF), and common document formats. The attachment will be associated as a tax document for the recipient. Required: recipientId, file.

params.name: recipientId
params.description: ID of the recipient to attach the file to

params.name: file
params.description: The file to upload (tax form document)

tools.name: recipients_create
tools.description: Create a new recipient for making payments. Required: emails, name. Optional: address, checkInfo, contactEmail (plus 3 more). Returns the new RecipientInfo.

params.name: checkInfo
params.description: Information needed to send a physical check.

params.name: contactEmail
params.description: Contact email address of the recipient

params.name: domesticWireRoutingInfo
params.description: Information needed to send a domestic wire.

params.name: electronicRoutingInfo
params.description: Information needed to send an ACH.

tools.name: recipients_get
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all recipients. Use cursor parameters (start_after, end_before) for pagination. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start_after, end_before (plus 1 more). Returns the RecipientsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: recipients_list-attachments
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all recipient tax form attachments across all recipients in the organization. Use cursor parameters (start_after, end_before) for pagination. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start_after, end_before (plus 1 more). Returns the RecipientsAttachmentsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: request-send-money_get-send-money-approval-request
tools.description: Get send money approval request by ID. Required: requestId. Returns the SendMoneyApprovalRequestResponse.

tools.name: request-send-money_list-send-money-approval-requests
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of send money approval requests for the authenticated organization. Supports filtering by account and status. Optional: accountId, status, start_after (plus 2 more). Returns the SendMoneyApprovalRequestsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: safes_get-request
tools.description: Retrieve a specific SAFE request by its ID. Required: safeRequestId. Returns the ApisafeRequest.

tools.name: safes_get-requests
tools.description: Retrieve all SAFE (Simple Agreement for Future Equity) requests for your organization. Returns array of ApisafeRequest.

tools.name: safes_document_get-safe-request
tools.description: Download the PDF document for a specific SAFE request. Returns binary PDF data with a Content-Disposition header. Required: safeRequestId.

tools.name: statements_pdf_get-statement
tools.description: Downloads a PDF file for the specified account statement. The response includes a Content-Disposition header for proper file download handling. Returns binary PDF data. Required: statementId.

tools.name: transaction_get-by-id
tools.description: Retrieve a single transaction by its ID. Returns full transaction details including attachments, check images, and related metadata. Required: transactionId.

tools.name: transaction_update
tools.description: Update the note and/or category of an existing transaction. Use null values to clear existing data. Required: transactionId, categoryId, note. Returns the updated Transaction.

params.name: note
params.description: Note update action. Omit field to keep current note, send null or empty string to clear note, send text to set note.

tools.name: transaction_attachments_upload-transaction
tools.description: Upload a file attachment to a transaction. The file is uploaded via multipart/form-data. Supported file types include PDF, images (PNG, JPG, GIF), and common document formats. Required: transactionId, file. Optional: attachmentType.

params.name: transactionId
params.description: ID of the transaction to attach the file to

params.name: attachmentType
params.description: Type of attachment: 'receipt', 'bill', or 'other'. Defaults to 'other'.

tools.name: transactions_list
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all transactions across all accounts. Supports advanced filtering by date ranges, status, categories, and cursor-based pagination. Optional: status, search, start (plus 11 more). Returns the TransactionsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: transfer_create-internal
tools.description: Transfer funds between two accounts within the same organization. Supports transfers between depository accounts (checking/savings), from a depository account to a treasury/investment account, and from a treasury/investment account to a depository account. Creates paired debit and credit transactions. Required: amount, destinationAccountId, idempotencyKey, sourceAccountId. Optional: note. Returns the new InternalTransferApiresponse.

params.name: amount
params.description: A positive dollar amount with at least 1 cent.

tools.name: treasury_get
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all treasury accounts associated with the authenticated organization. Use cursor parameters (start_after, end_before) for pagination. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start_after, end_before (plus 1 more). Returns the TreasuryAccountsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: treasury_statements_get-treasury
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of statements for a specific treasury account. Supports cursor-based pagination and filtering by document type. Required: treasuryId. Optional: limit (default: 1000), order (default: asc), start_after (plus 2 more). Returns the TreasuryStatementsPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: treasury_transactions_get-treasury
tools.description: Retrieve paginated treasury transactions for a specific treasury account. Required: treasuryId. Optional: limit (default: 100), order (default: desc), cursor. Returns the TreasuryTransactionsResponse.

tools.name: users_get
tools.description: Get all users. Optional: limit (default: 1000), start_after, end_before (plus 1 more). Returns the UsersPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: users_get-userid
tools.description: Get user by ID. Required: userId. Returns the UserDetails.

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Register a new webhook endpoint to receive event notifications. Required: url. Optional: eventTypes, filterPaths. Returns the new ApiWebhookResponse.

params.name: eventTypes
params.description: Optional array of event types to subscribe to. Nothing means subscribe to all event types.

params.name: filterPaths
params.description: Optional array of resource field paths to filter events by. When specified, webhook events will only be sent when one of these fields changes. Nothing means no filtering (all events are sent).

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to which webhook events will be delivered

tools.name: webhooks_delete
tools.description: Delete a webhook endpoint. Required: webhookEndpointId. Destructive.

tools.name: webhooks_get
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all webhook endpoints for your organization. Supports filtering by status. Optional: status, limit (default: 1000), start_after (plus 2 more). Returns the ApiWebhooksPaginatedResponse.

tools.name: webhooks_get-webhookendpointid
tools.description: Retrieve details of a specific webhook endpoint by ID. Required: webhookEndpointId. Returns the ApiWebhookResponse.

tools.name: webhooks_update
tools.description: Update the configuration of an existing webhook endpoint. A webhook that has been disabled due to consecutive delivery failures can be reactivated by setting its status to 'active'. Required: webhookEndpointId. Optional: eventTypes, filterPaths, status (plus 1 more). Returns the new ApiWebhookResponse.

params.name: eventTypes
params.description: Event types to subscribe to. Send null to subscribe to all event types. Send an array to subscribe to specific types. Omit to leave unchanged.

params.name: filterPaths
params.description: Resource field paths to filter events by. When specified, webhook events will only be sent when one of these fields changes. Send null for no filtering. Send an array to filter by specific fields. Omit to leave unchanged.

params.name: url
params.description: The URL to which webhook events will be delivered. Omit to leave unchanged.

tools.name: webhooks_verify_webhook
tools.description: Send a test event to verify the webhook endpoint is properly configured and reachable. The request body accepts an optional 'eventType' field to specify which event type to test (e.g., 'transaction.created', 'transaction.updated'). If omitted from the request body, defaults to 'transaction.created'. Required: webhookEndpointId. Optional: eventType.
